product_overview: A Turkish-language admin web app for fitness coaches to manage their students, generate workout programs (including AI-assisted drafts), review meal and form photos, and message students. Built for desktop use with a focused set of coach-facing workflows (dashboard, students, messages, profile).
core_goals: Sign in as a coach and access a personalized dashboard with KPIs and recent activity.
Browse and search a coach's student list, open individual student details, and view onboarding data in Turkish.
Generate, preview and manage workout programs (including AI-generated drafts) for a student within a 3-draft limit.
View and inspect students' meal photos and form-analysis photos in enlarged view.
Send and receive messages with assigned students from a conversation list and chat view.
Manage the coach's own profile information and view app-wide Turkish text rendering.

features.name: Coach Login
features.description: Authenticate as a coach using email and password; form validation and inline credential error are shown in Turkish; successful login navigates to the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Submit empty form -> See HTML5 validation requiring email and password
Navigate to /login -> Type incorrect credentials and submit -> See inline Turkish error indicating credentials are wrong
Navigate to /login -> Type correct credentials and submit -> See loading state text 'Giriş yapılıyor...' -> Be redirected to /

features.name: Logout
features.description: End the coach session which clears authentication and returns the user to the login page; protected routes no longer accessible after logout.
user_flows: Be authenticated and on any protected route -> Initiate logout -> Be redirected to /login -> Attempt to navigate back to protected routes and be redirected to /login

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Landing page for coaches showing KPI cards and recent purchases to give a quick view of activity.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See KPI cards and a Recent Purchases list load with skeletons then data
Navigate to / -> Use navigation to open /students -> Observe transition from dashboard to student list

features.name: Student List
features.description: View the coach's students with tabs for All/Active/New(7d), filter via search, and open a student's detail view.
user_flows: Navigate to /students -> See skeleton loaders then student rows populate
Navigate to /students -> Type a query in the search box -> See student list filter by name, email or goal
Navigate to /students -> Switch to Aktif tab -> See list filtered to active students
Navigate to /students -> Switch to Yeni (7g) tab -> See list filtered to recent purchases
Navigate to /students -> Select a student from the list -> Student detail opens

features.name: Student Detail Tabs (Genel Bakış, Programlar, Öğün Fotoğrafları, Form Analizi)
features.description: Inspect a student's profile across four specific tabs; Mesajlar tab must not be present in this tab bar.
user_flows: Navigate to /students -> Select a student -> See Genel Bakış tab load by default with onboarding fields
Navigate to /students -> Select a student -> Open Programlar tab -> Programs tab content renders
Navigate to /students -> Select a student -> Open Öğün Fotoğrafları tab -> Meal photos grid renders
Navigate to /students -> Select a student -> Open Form Analizi tab -> Form analysis section and photos render
Navigate to /students -> Select a student -> Inspect tab bar -> Verify there is no Mesajlar tab present

features.name: Onboarding Data Localized Render
features.description: All onboarding values and labels in the student's Genel Bakış are rendered in Turkish and specific fields removed (no Diz ağrısı, no Supplement kullanımı).
user_flows: Navigate to /students -> Select a student -> Open Genel Bakış tab -> Verify onboarding labels and values render in Turkish (e.g., 'Başlangıç seviyesi', 'Endomorf')
Navigate to /students -> Select a student -> Open Genel Bakış tab -> Verify there are no Diz ağrısı or Supplement kullanımı rows
Navigate to /students -> Select a student -> Open Genel Bakış tab -> Verify preferred days are shown as Turkish day names joined by commas

features.name: AI Workout Program Generation (Programlar tab)
features.description: Generate an AI-assisted workout program for a student from the Programlar tab and preview the produced multi-day plan with visible loading state during generation.
user_flows: Navigate to /students -> Select a student -> Open Programlar tab -> Start AI generation (AI ile Üret) -> See loading spinner or status text during generation
Navigate to /students -> Select a student -> Open Programlar tab -> Start AI generation -> See program preview rendered with 4–5 day cards (demo seeds may produce 4 days)

features.name: Draft System (Programlar tab)
features.description: Manage up to three workout draft versions per student; the UI enforces the three-draft limit when the user attempts to create more.
user_flows: Navigate to /students -> Select a student -> Open Programlar tab -> Generate first draft -> See first draft tab appear
Navigate to /students -> Select a student -> Open Programlar tab -> Generate second draft -> See second draft tab appear
Navigate to /students -> Select a student -> Open Programlar tab -> Generate third draft -> See third draft tab appear
Navigate to /students -> Select a student -> Open Programlar tab -> Attempt to generate a fourth draft -> System prevents creation so no fourth draft tab is visible

features.name: Meal Photos (Öğün Fotoğrafları)
features.description: View student's uploaded meal photos in a grid and open any photo to see an enlarged view.
user_flows: Navigate to /students -> Select a student -> Open Öğün Fotoğrafları tab -> See meal photos displayed in a grid
Navigate to /students -> Select a student -> Open Öğün Fotoğrafları tab -> Open a photo from the grid -> See the photo in an enlarged modal or viewer

features.name: Form Analysis (Form Analizi)
features.description: Review the four-angle body form photos (front, back, left, right) and enlarge them for inspection.
user_flows: Navigate to /students -> Select a student -> Open Form Analizi tab -> See front/back/left/right photos present
Navigate to /students -> Select a student -> Open Form Analizi tab -> Open a form photo -> See the photo in an enlarged modal

features.name: Messages (Conversation list + Chat)
features.description: Access conversations with active students, open a chat thread, and send messages that appear in the conversation history; no online/offline status is shown.
user_flows: Navigate to /messages -> See conversation list populated
Navigate to /messages -> Select a conversation -> Chat panel opens with message history
Navigate to /messages -> Select a conversation -> Type a message in the input -> Send the message -> See the message appear in the chat list
Navigate to /messages -> Open a conversation -> Inspect conversation list and chat UI -> Verify there is no online/offline status pill

features.name: My Profile
features.description: View and edit the coach's profile information (bio, social links, profile photo) and copy the referral code.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> See current profile information load
Navigate to /profile -> Edit bio and social links -> Save changes -> See updated profile reflected
Navigate to /profile -> View referral code -> Copy referral code to clipboard

features.name: Turkish Character Rendering
features.description: Verify correct rendering of Turkish diacritics across the app in labels, names and statuses.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Inspect labels and button text -> Verify Turkish diacritics (ç, ş, ğ, ü, ö, ı, İ) render correctly
Navigate to /students -> Spot-check student names and labels -> Verify Turkish characters render correctly
Navigate to /profile -> Inspect profile fields and navigation labels -> Verify Turkish diacritics render correctly

features.name: Error & Validation Messaging (user-triggered)
features.description: User-facing validation errors and translated toast messages are presented in Turkish; validation errors are triggered by user input and shown via Toasts or inline messages.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Submit empty form -> See inline validation messages in Turkish
Navigate to /students -> Use a form or input that triggers validation (e.g., required field left empty) -> See a user-friendly Turkish toast or inline error message

routes.description: Coach's student list with All / Active / New (7d) tabs and search
Student detail with 4 tabs (Genel Bakış, Programlar, Öğün Fotoğrafları, Form Analizi)

features.name: Coach Login
features.description: Email/password login. Empty form triggers HTML5 validation. Wrong credentials show "E-posta veya şifre hatalı." inline. Successful login navigates to /.
user_interactions: Submit empty form → email required validation
Type wrong password → red error banner with Turkish message
Type correct credentials → redirected to / (Dashboard)
Loading state shows "Giriş yapılıyor..." text on button

features.name: Logout
features.description: Logout from sidebar/topbar clears token. Pressing back after logout should NOT re-enter dashboard.
user_interactions: Click Çıkış Yap button → navigates to /login
localStorage token cleared
ProtectedRoute redirects authenticated routes back to /login

features.name: Student List
features.description: Loads /coach/students/all by default. Tabs Tümü/Aktif/Yeni(7g). Click a row → /students/:id. Search bar filters by name/email/goal/package.
user_interactions: Page loads, skeleton shown then student rows
Click row → navigate to /students/:id
Type query in search box → filters list
Click Aktif/Yeni(7g) tabs → endpoint switches

features.name: Student Detail Tabs
features.description: Four tabs (Genel Bakış, Programlar, Öğün Fotoğrafları, Form Analizi). Mesajlar tab was removed; Mesajlar exists only in sidebar.
user_interactions: Default tab Genel Bakış loads onboarding fields in Turkish
Click Programlar → ProgramsTab renders
Click Öğün Fotoğrafları → MealPhotosTab renders
Click Form Analizi → form analysis section renders
There must NOT be a Mesajlar tab in this tab bar

features.name: Onboarding Data Localized Render
features.description: Onboarding values rendered in Turkish (e.g. beginner=Başlangıç seviyesi, endomorph=Endomorf, low=Düşük, moderately_fit=Orta düzey fit). Diz ağrısı and Supplement kullanımı fields removed. Preferred days shown as Pazartesi/Çarşamba/... joined with comma.
user_interactions: Open Genel Bakış tab and verify Turkish labels
Verify no Diz ağrısı / Supplement rows are present
Verify preferred days in Turkish

features.name: AI Workout Program Generation (Programlar tab)
features.description: AI ile Üret button calls backend AI endpoint. Loading indicator visible during generation. Generated program shows 4–5 day plan; for Buse demo seed, it should produce 4 days (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sat).
user_interactions: Click Programlar tab
Click AI ile Üret button
Loading spinner / status text appears
Program preview rendered with 4–5 day cards

features.name: Draft System (Programlar tab)
features.description: Up to 3 workout draft tabs can be created. Saving past 3 should be blocked or oldest replaced.
user_interactions: Generate first draft → tab
Generate second draft → tab
Generate third draft → tab
Attempt to generate fourth → limit enforced (no 4th tab visible)

features.name: Messages (Conversation list + Chat)
features.description: /messages route shows conversations with active students. Selecting a conversation opens chat. No Çevrimiçi/Çevrimdışı status (removed). Send a message and see it appear in the message list.
user_interactions: Page load → conversation list visible
Select conversation → chat panel opens with history
Verify no online/offline pill is rendered
Type message in textarea → click send → message appears in list

features.name: Turkish Character Rendering
features.description: All TR diacritics (ç, ş, ğ, ü, ö, ı, İ, Ç, Ş, Ğ, Ü, Ö) render correctly across the app — names, labels, statuses, button text.
user_interactions: Spot-check labels on Login, Students, StudentDetail, Messages

features.name: Network Error Handling
features.description: When backend is unreachable, errors are translated through errorHandler.translateError() and shown via Toast — never raw exception text.
user_interactions: Force offline / 5xx → toast shows user-friendly TR message

known_limitations.issue: Tests run against production URL https://fithub-admin-nwtg.onrender.com when BASE_URL env is set; otherwise hit local preview on 5173.
known_limitations.impact: Slower runs against production, depends on Render cold start.

known_limitations.issue: Free TestSprite plan caps at 30 production tests / 15 dev tests per run.
known_limitations.impact: Test plan must be prioritized; lower-priority cases may be skipped.

known_limitations.issue: AI program generation can be slow (10–60s) depending on backend cold start and OpenAI latency.
known_limitations.impact: Tests need long timeout (≥120s) for AI generation flows.
